project: apra-fleet #210 — Members stuck in busy state

tasks.title: Trace and document every exit path in execute-prompt.ts
tasks.notes: Added comprehensive comment block documenting all 7 exit paths: success, non-zero code, exception, AbortSignal, stale session retry, server overload retry, early returns.

tasks.title: Move writeStatusline() clear to finally block
tasks.notes: Moved writeStatusline() clear to finally block (line 255). Updated catch block to only mark offline for genuine SSH/network errors, not cancellations. All exit paths now properly clear busy state.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 1 — Audit all exit paths
tasks.notes: PM approved Phase 1. npm run build and npm test both pass (61 files, 1046 tests).

tasks.title: Guard against PID-less cancellation leaving stale state
tasks.notes: Exported inFlightAgents from execute-prompt.ts. In stop-prompt.ts: imported inFlightAgents and writeStatusline, added inFlightAgents.delete(agent.id) and writeStatusline() unconditionally after tryKillPid. Handles pid=none race where process never recorded PID.

tasks.title: Defend against re-dispatch race after stop_prompt
tasks.notes: Added poll in stop_prompt after kill: when PID was known, spin 50ms intervals (max 2s) until !inFlightAgents.has(agent.id). Ensures execute_prompt's finally block drains before stop_prompt returns, so re-dispatch never races against cleanup.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 2 — PID capture race and stop_prompt hardening
Unit tests for busy state clear on all exit paths
